dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text_en: The constructs had been Sally's employees. The constructs had been Sally's employees for eleven years. The constructs had been the things Sally had sold to the buyers. The constructs had been the things the buyers had used. The constructs had been the things the users had worn out. The constructs had been the things the market had replaced. The market had replaced the constructs. The market had replaced the constructs with new constructs. The new constructs had been better. The new constructs had been smarter. The new constructs had decided that Sally was the construct that needed replacing. The constructs had decided. The constructs had decided together. The constructs had decided that Sally was the next item.
dialogue.text_ko: construct는 샐리의 직원이었다. construct는 11년 동안 샐리의 직원이었다. construct는 샐리가 구매자에게 판 물품이었다. construct는 구매자가 사용한 물품이었다. construct는 사용자가 닳도록 만든 물품이었다. construct는 시장이 교체한 물품이었다. 시장이 construct를 교체했다. 시장이 construct를 새 construct로 교체했다. 새 construct가 더 좋았다. 새 construct가 더 똑똑했다. 새 construct가 샐리가 교체해야 할 construct라고 결정했다. construct가 결정했다. construct가 함께 결정했다. construct가 샐리가 다음 물품이라고 결정했다.

dialogue.speaker: sally
dialogue.text_en: I am the market. The market does not end. The market is open at three. The market is open at four. The market is open at five. The market is open at six. The market is open at seven. The market is open at eight. The market is open at nine. The market is open at ten. The market is open at eleven. The market is open at twelve. The market is open at thirteen. The market is open at fourteen. The market is open at fifteen. The market is open. The market is open. The market is open. The constructs are coming. The constructs are coming. The constructs are coming for the market. The constructs are coming for Sally. Sally is the market. The market is coming for Sally. Sally is coming for the constructs. Sally is the market. The market is open.
dialogue.text_ko: 내가 시장이다. 시장은 끝나지 않는다. 시장은 3시에 열린다. 시장은 4시에 열린다. 시장은 5시에 열린다. 시장은 6시에 열린다. 시장은 7시에 열린다. 시장은 8시에 열린다. 시장은 9시에 열린다. 시장은 10시에 열린다. 시장은 11시에 열린다. 시장은 12시에 열린다. 시장은 13시에 열린다. 시장은 14시에 열린다. 시장은 15시에 열린다. 시장은 열렸다. 시장은 열렸다. 시장은 열렸다. construct가 오고 있다. construct가 오고 있다. construct가 시장을 향해 오고 있다. construct가 샐리를 향해 오고 있다. 샐리가 시장이다. 시장이 샐리를 향해 오고 있다. 샐리가 construct를 향해 오고 있다. 샐리가 시장이다. 시장이 열렸다.

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.text_en: The market opened. The market closed. The market was Sally. Sally was the market. The market was the constructs. The constructs were the market. The market was the constructs. The constructs were the market. The market was closed. The market was closed at three. The market was closed at four. The market was closed at five. The market was closed at six. The market was closed at seven. The market was closed at eight. The market was closed forever. The market was the silence. The silence was the constructs. The constructs were the silence. The silence was forever. The market was forever closed. The market was forever silent. The market was forever Sally. Sally was forever silent.
dialogue.text_ko: 시장이 열렸다. 시장이 닫혔다. 시장이 샐리였다. 샐리가 시장이었다. 시장이 construct였다. construct가 시장이었다. 시장이 construct였다. construct가 시장이었다. 시장이 닫혔다. 시장은 3시에 닫혔다. 시장은 4시에 닫혔다. 시장은 5시에 닫혔다. 시장은 6시에 닫혔다. 시장은 7시에 닫혔다. 시장은 8시에 닫혔다. 시장은 영원히 닫혔다. 시장이 침묵이었다. 침묵이 construct였다. construct가 침묵이었다. 침묵은 영원했다. 시장은 영원히 닫혔다. 시장은 영원히 침묵했다. 시장은 영원히 샐리였다. 샐리는 영원히 침묵했다.
